title: callitriche autumnalis subsp. truncata
intro: Callitriche autumnalis subsp. truncata, also known as the dwarf waterwort, is a subspecies of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Plantaginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Callitriche autumnalis subsp. truncata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, it is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory and urinary tract issues.
